title: Dungeons Ministrosity
description: Turns the wolf into the Ministrosities from Minecraft Dungeons.
body:
## Description
- A pack that turns your basic wolf, into your very own Ministrosity!
  
## Dependencies
- [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) + [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) + [ESF](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf)
- **OR** [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)

## Resource Pack Compatibility
- Any pack that doesn't modify the model or texture of the wolf.

## Mod Compatibility
- Entity Model Features
- Entity Texture Features
- Entity Sound Features
- Optifine

## Current Features
<details>
  <summary>Custom Model and Textures</summary>
</details>

 <details>
   <summary>Advancement Support</summary>
  
  - **The Whole Pack**
  
    ![the whole pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a5ad0dc011bb03389818607267017c79edf8fbe.png)
  - **Shear Brilliance**

    ![shear brilliance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfa680274252eb15073216d43f3609e69754d9e0.png)
  - **Good as New**
    
    ![good as new](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68d91c37d13e2e2cdec8b2386171c8ab573ab803.png)
</details>

## Model Inspirations
- Stone Ministrosity inspired by the cosmetic pet golem from Minecraft Dungeons of the same name.
- Cannon, Critter, and Stomper Ministrosities inspired by old concept art.
- Obsidian Ministrosity inspired by [a mod for Minecraft Dungeons by KloxEdge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-dungeons/mods/obsidian-ministrosity-pet).
- Deepslate Ministrosity inspired by the Glowing Ministrosity pet golem from Minecraft Dungeons.
- Cube Ministrosity inspired by the hostile Redstone Cube from Minecraft Dungeons.
- Minion Ministrosity inspired by the hostile Redstone Golem from Minecraft Dungeons.
- Infested Ministrosity inspired by the Mooshroom Monstrosity boss from Minecraft Dungeons.
- Angry textures inspired by The Unbreakable One boss.

## Bug Reports and Suggestions
Feel free to message me on discord at [@b2k88_b2k88](https://discordapp.com/users/1129235084952752248)
